executives.name: Lori Ryerkerk
executives.background: Chairman, Chief Executive Officer and President of Celanese Corporation since 2019. Previously Executive Vice President of Global Manufacturing, Shell Downstream Inc.

executives.name: Philip Davidson
executives.background: Admiral Davidson (Ret.) has served as a director since 2022. He retired from the United States Navy as Commander, U.S. Indo-Pacific Command.

executives.name: Steven Leer
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Arch Coal, Inc. He has served on our board since 2013.
